failures.description: The agent misread or failed to use the tool result correctly, selecting a more expensive available Jigsaw Puzzle instead of the cheapest available one shown in the results.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output was available before the failing decision. At index 3, ProductCatalogSearch returned items sorted by ascending price, and the first item, item_id "9665100170", was available=true with price 45.39. At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer claiming item_id "1096508426" at 46.13 was the cheapest available Jigsaw Puzzle. This contradicts the tool output and omits the cheaper available item. The earlier use of available_only=false was suboptimal, but the returned evidence still contained enough information to answer correctly.
